name: Linkage Software Co., LTD
summary: Linkage Software Co., LTD offers financial software outsourcing services for domestic securities industry. The company's software is used for the implementation of the line items, which includes micro-credit financing platform for online brokerage, data mining solutions, real-time big data solutions, public equity raised platform and integrated financial services platform solutions, business related to the field of Internet banking, mobile data terminals, big data analytics, and trading and other pages. It also offers software development services. Linkage Software Co., LTD was founded in 2003 and is based in Suzhou, China.
